back_translation: If his offering is a peace offering, and he presents an animal from the herd of cattle, whether male or female, he must present one without blemish before the face of the Lord.
He shall lay his hand on the head of the offering and kill it at the entrance of the tent of meeting, and the sons of Aaron, the priests, shall sprinkle the blood on all sides of the altar.
And from the peace offering he shall present an offering by fire to the Lord, namely the fat that covers the entrails and all the fat that is on the entrails.
And both kidneys with the fat that is on them near the loins, and the lobe of the liver, which he shall remove together with the kidneys.
And the sons of Aaron shall burn these things as smoke on the altar, on top of the burnt offering that is on the wood that is on the fire, as an offering by fire, a pleasing aroma to the Lord.
And if his peace offering to the Lord is from the flock of small animals, he must present a male or female without blemish.
If he presents a lamb as his offering, he shall present it before the face of the Lord.
He shall lay his hand on the head of his offering and kill it in front of the tent of meeting, and the sons of Aaron shall sprinkle its blood on all sides of the altar.

And from the peace offering he shall present an offering by fire to the Lord, namely its fat: the entire fat tail cut off at the backbone, the fat that covers the entrails, and all the fat that is on the entrails.
And both kidneys with the fat that is on them near the loins, and the lobe of the liver, which he shall remove together with the kidneys.
And the priest shall burn these things as smoke on the altar as food, an offering by fire to the Lord.
And if his offering is a goat, he shall present it before the face of the Lord.
He shall lay his hand on the head of the goat and kill it in front of the tent of meeting, and the sons of Aaron shall sprinkle its blood on all sides of the altar.
And he shall present an offering by fire to the Lord from the offering, namely the fat that covers the entrails and all the fat that is on the entrails.
And both kidneys with the fat that is on them near the loins, and the lobe of the liver, which he shall remove together with the kidneys.
And the priest shall burn these things as smoke on the altar as food, an offering by fire, a pleasing aroma. All the fat belongs to the Lord.
This is a permanent statute throughout all your generations, in all the places where you dwell: you must not eat any fat or any blood.
